config.footerTagline: Section 8-friendly rental homes across Greater Cleveland.
config.llmsSummary: Rent Finder Cleveland is a local residential rental service in Cleveland, Ohio. We work with 90+ rental homes — every one accepts Section 8 / Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready — concentrated on Cleveland's East and Southeast sides. This site helps renters find houses and apartments for rent in Cleveland OH, understand Section 8 vouchers, and book showings.

book-showing.label: Schedule a Free Showing
book-showing.pitch: Ready to see a Section 8-friendly Cleveland home in person?
book-showing.sub: Pick a time that works for you — no cost, no obligation.
book-showing.blockTitle: See a Cleveland rental in person
book-showing.blockBody: Book a free showing with our local leasing team. Every home we work with welcomes Housing Choice Vouchers and is HUD-inspection-ready.

contact.label: See Available Homes
contact.pitch: Tell our local team what you're looking for.
contact.sub: We add Section 8-ready homes regularly across Greater Cleveland.
contact.blockTitle: Looking for a rental in this area?
contact.blockBody: Tell us what you need and we'll show you what's available now. We work with 90+ voucher-friendly homes across the Cleveland area and add more regularly.

apply.label: Apply Now
apply.sub: Start your rental application online through our secure portal.
apply.blockBody: Start your application online in minutes through our secure DoorLoop portal, or book a showing first to see the home in person.

sms-alerts.label: Get Rental Updates
sms-alerts.pitch: Want to hear about new Cleveland homes first?
sms-alerts.sub: Tell us your criteria and we'll reach out when something fits.
sms-alerts.blockTitle: Be first to know about new homes
sms-alerts.blockBody: Share what you're looking for and our team will contact you as voucher-friendly homes open up across Cleveland.

masterHub.title: Cleveland Rental Resource Center
masterHub.metaTitle: Cleveland Rental Guides: Neighborhoods, Section 8 & More
masterHub.metaDescription: Your guide to renting in Cleveland, OH — houses and apartments by neighborhood, suburb, and budget, plus Section 8 help and renter tips. Book a showing.
masterHub.heroSub: Everything you need to find and rent your next home across Greater Cleveland — organized by neighborhood, suburb, budget, and housing program.

pillars.title: Houses for Rent in Cleveland, OH
pillars.metaTitle: Houses for Rent in Cleveland OH | Section 8 Friendly
pillars.metaDescription: Houses for rent in Cleveland, OH from a local rental team. 2–3 bedroom homes, ~$700–$1,800/mo, and every home accepts Section 8. Book a free showing.
pillars.heroSub: Local, Section 8-friendly rental homes across Cleveland's East, Southeast, and West sides — with a real leasing team you can actually reach.

pillars.title: Apartments for Rent in Cleveland, OH
pillars.metaTitle: Apartments for Rent in Cleveland OH by Area & Budget
pillars.metaDescription: Apartments for rent in Cleveland, OH — by neighborhood, size, and budget. Affordable and voucher-friendly options, plus how to tour and apply. Book a showing.
pillars.heroSub: From downtown lofts to affordable neighborhood apartments — how to find, tour, and rent an apartment in Cleveland.

pillars.title: Section 8 Housing in Cleveland, OH
pillars.metaTitle: Section 8 Housing in Cleveland OH | Voucher-Friendly Homes
pillars.metaDescription: Section 8 housing in Cleveland, OH — how CMHA vouchers work, applying, payment standards, and finding homes that accept them. Every home we work with is voucher-friendly.
pillars.heroSub: The complete Cleveland renter's guide to Housing Choice Vouchers — and a local team whose homes all welcome them.

neighborhoods.label: Cleveland Neighborhoods
neighborhoods.hubTitle: Houses for Rent by Cleveland Neighborhood
neighborhoods.metaTitle: Houses for Rent by Cleveland Neighborhood
neighborhoods.metaDescription: Rent ranges, transit, and housing stock for renting a house or apartment in every major Cleveland, OH neighborhood — plus Section 8-friendly homes.
neighborhoods.heroSub: Compare rent ranges, transit, and what to expect renting in each Cleveland neighborhood — from Ohio City and Tremont to Slavic Village, Collinwood, and Glenville.

suburbs.label: Cleveland Suburbs
suburbs.hubTitle: Houses for Rent in Cleveland Suburbs
suburbs.metaTitle: Houses for Rent in the Cleveland Suburbs
suburbs.metaDescription: Renting in the Cleveland suburbs — Lakewood, Parma, Euclid, Cleveland Heights and more. Rent ranges, commute, and what renters should know.
suburbs.heroSub: What to know about renting a house or apartment across the Cleveland suburbs — rent ranges, commute times, and local details for each community.

houses.label: Houses by Type & Budget
houses.hubTitle: Houses for Rent in Cleveland by Type & Budget
houses.metaTitle: Cleveland Houses for Rent by Type & Budget
houses.metaDescription: Find Cleveland houses for rent by bedrooms, budget, and features — 2 and 3 bedroom homes, under $1,000, pet friendly, with a yard, and more.
houses.heroSub: Browse Cleveland rental homes the way you actually search — by bedrooms, monthly budget, and the features that matter to you.

apartments.label: Cleveland Apartments
apartments.metaTitle: Apartments for Rent in Cleveland OH by Area & Budget
apartments.metaDescription: Cleveland apartments for rent by neighborhood, size, and budget — studios, 1 and 2 bedrooms, downtown lofts, and cheap apartments under $1,000.
apartments.heroSub: Apartment-hunting in Cleveland — by neighborhood, size, and budget, including affordable and voucher-friendly options.
apartments.cardDesc: Studios to 2-bedrooms, by area and price.

section-8.label: Section 8 & Vouchers
section-8.metaTitle: Section 8 Housing & Vouchers in Cleveland OH
section-8.metaDescription: How Section 8 and Housing Choice Vouchers work in Cleveland (CMHA) — applying, waitlists, payment standards, inspections, and finding voucher-friendly homes.
section-8.heroSub: Everything Cleveland renters need to know about Housing Choice Vouchers and CMHA — and how to find homes that welcome them. Every home we work with accepts Section 8.
section-8.cardDesc: CMHA vouchers, applying, and voucher-friendly homes.

guides.label: Renter Guides
guides.metaTitle: Cleveland Renter Guides: Deposits, Applications & Rights
guides.metaDescription: Practical guides for renting in Cleveland and Ohio — security deposits, applications, credit, utilities, tenant rights, and avoiding rental scams.
guides.heroSub: Straight answers to the questions Cleveland renters actually ask — deposits, applications, credit, utilities, Ohio tenant rights, and more.

more.label: Other Rentals
more.metaDescription: Rooms for rent, short-term stays, senior and student housing, and other Cleveland rental needs — what's realistic and where to start.
more.heroSub: We focus on residential rental homes — here's honest guidance on other Cleveland housing needs and how we can help point you in the right direction.
more.cardDesc: Rooms, short-term, senior, student and more.
